PF15DV.Settings.PerceptionEnabled.Name: Enable Perception Reveals
PF15DV.Settings.PerceptionEnabled.Hint: Enable hidden-creature discovery: GM marks a token undetected; only players who have spotted it (or after a global reveal) can see it.
PF15DV.Settings.SpellcraftEnabled.Name: Enable Spellcraft Reveals
PF15DV.Settings.SpellcraftEnabled.Hint: Mask non-player spellcasting: players see a generic "a spell is being cast" notice until they succeed at a Spellcraft check. The spell's identity stays on the active GM's client.
PF15DV.Settings.DebugLogging.Name: Discovery Veil Debug Logging
PF15DV.Settings.DebugLogging.Hint: Log discovery-gate diagnostics to the browser console.
PF15DV.Dialog.SpottedHint: Check each player who has personally spotted this creature. They will see it; others will not until you reveal globally.
PF15DV.Notify.PriorHiddenRetained: Discovery gate revealed, but this token stays hidden because you had already hidden it before the gate — its native hidden state was retained.
PF15DV.Dialog.RequestHint: Set the hidden DC (kept on your screen only) and choose which players to ask. Each picked player gets a prompt to roll; on a success they will personally spot this creature.
PF15DV.Dialog.RollPromptBody: The GM is asking you to roll Perception. Roll now?
PF15DV.Notify.NoActiveGate: No active discovery gate on that token — mark it undetected first.
PF15DV.Notify.NotActiveGM: Only the active GM can request Perception checks (the hidden DC lives on that client).
PF15DV.Notify.NoEligiblePlayers: No eligible players — each needs an assigned, player-owned character.
PF15DV.Notify.BadDC: Enter a whole-number DC, or leave it blank for manual adjudication.
PF15DV.Notify.DCStoreFailed: Could not store the hidden DC on this client.
PF15DV.Notify.NoCharacter: You have no player-owned character to roll Perception with.
PF15DV.Notify.NoSocketlib: Perception roll requests need the socketlib module. Enable it in Manage Modules.
PF15DV.Notify.ResultNoDC: {actor} rolled Perception ({total}). No hidden DC set — use Manage Spotted to adjudicate.
PF15DV.Notify.ResultSuccess: {actor} succeeded (rolled {total}) and now personally sees the creature.
PF15DV.Notify.ResultFail: {actor} rolled {total} and did not spot the creature.
PF15DV.Spell.MaskNoStore: Spell card hidden, but its identity could not be stored (you are not the active GM) — it cannot be revealed later.
PF15DV.Spell.RequestHint: Set the hidden Spellcraft DC (kept on your screen only; defaults to 15 + spell level) and choose which players to ask. Each picked player gets a prompt to roll; on a success they personally learn the spell's name and school.
PF15DV.Spell.RollPromptBody: The GM is asking you to roll Spellcraft to identify a spell being cast. Roll now?
PF15DV.Spell.NoActiveMask: No active masked spell for that card.
PF15DV.Spell.NotActiveGM: Only the active GM can request Spellcraft checks (the spell identity lives on that client).
PF15DV.Spell.NoEligiblePlayers: No eligible players — each needs a player-owned character trained in Spellcraft (rank 1 or more).
PF15DV.Spell.NoCharacter: You have no Spellcraft-trained character to roll with.
PF15DV.Spell.ResultNoDC: {actor} rolled Spellcraft ({total}). No hidden DC set for this cast.
PF15DV.Spell.ResultFail: {actor} rolled {total} and did not identify the spell.
PF15DV.Panel.Title: Discovery Veil — Active Gates
PF15DV.Panel.GMOnly: This panel is for the GM only.
PF15DV.Panel.NotActiveGM: You are not the active GM — hidden DCs and spell identities live on the active GM's client and are not shown here.
PF15DV.Panel.RenderError: The discovery panel could not be rendered — see the console.
PF15DV.Panel.PerceptionDisabled: Perception reveals are disabled (enable in module settings).
PF15DV.Panel.SpellDisabled: Spellcraft reveals are disabled (enable in module settings).
PF15DV.Panel.FocusOtherScene: That token is on another scene.
PF15DV.Keybind.OpenPanel.Name: Open Discovery Veil panel
PF15DV.Keybind.OpenPanel.Hint: Toggle the GM panel listing active discovery gates (undetected creatures and masked spell casts).
